title: 日本ダービーの後に・勝利と焦燥と

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa gives her all in the Japanese
Derby and clenches the win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However... she's astonished by Special Week's
growth. It seems she was much faster than El
Condor Pasa expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Doubting her abilities, she begins to worry she
won't be able to spread her wings for the world
and advance confidently to the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing this, I decide that El Condor Pasa needs
some time to get her thoughts in order.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest running in the Mainichi Okan before
taking on the Japan Cup.
